name: Americanized Chicken Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into strips, about 2-inches long and 1/2-inch thick.
2. Place the chicken in a crockpot with salt, ginger, celery, water chestnuts, onions, bouillon, and soy sauce.
3. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 6 hours.
4. Turn the control to high. Add mushrooms and bean sprouts.
5. Cover and cook on high for 15 minutes.
6. Serve over hot rice and sprinkle with almonds. Serve with extra soy sauce, if desired.
